title: AmbientVRT project config (ambient.config.yaml)
description: User-authored configuration declaring adapters, baseline storage, compare thresholds, variants, and the canonical capture environment. Authored as YAML; validated against this schema after parsing to JSON.

adapters.description: One or more capture adapters to run.

storage.description: Where baselines live. The core stays stateless: baselines only, never run history.

threshold.description: Global pixelmatch threshold (0..1). Smaller is stricter. Default 0.1.

perSnapshot.description: Per-snapshot threshold overrides, keyed by snapshot id.

variants.description: Variant names the adapters should produce captures for (e.g. light, dark).

canonicalEnv.description: Reference to the canonical capture-env image (e.g. ambient/capture-env:<digest>). Captures from a different env are flagged.

projectPath.description: Path to the project root (flutter adapter).

storybookStaticDir.description: Path to the built Storybook static dir (react-native adapter).

path.description: Directory for the local backend's baselines.
